summary: Excellent matrix recording captures an ecstatic European show with standout renditions of Wharf Rat, Eyes of the World and U.S. Blues.
review: The tape delivers a crystal‑clear matrix mix that most listeners describe as “fantastic” or “exquisite,” while the performance itself is hailed as one of the band’s most generous and enthusiastic outings – highlighted by soaring versions of Wharf Rat, Eyes of the World, U.S. Blues and even a sun‑kissed Sunshine Daydream.  Aside from a minor gripe about a few seconds of lingering crowd noise after songs, the consensus is that this is an unmissable Desert Island addition.

ai_rating.rationale: The majority of reviews (5‑star) praise both the musical performance and the matrix recording quality; only one low‑rating comment notes a small crowd‑gap issue, leading to an overall very high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners repeatedly call the sound “fantastic,” “exquisite” and “crisp.” One reviewer notes that a few seconds of audience noise are left at the end of songs, but this is considered a minor inconvenience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is described as a joyous, generous set with multiple encores that kept the audience ecstatic; transitions are smooth and the overall pacing feels like a celebratory summer day.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised throughout – reviewers thank Jerry and note the playing as sophisticated and generous.
band_member_comments.Phil: Explicit thanks to Phil, indicating solid bass work appreciated by listeners.
band_member_comments.Bob: Thanked alongside the rest of the band; his contributions are viewed positively.
